name: SQL Injection via Template Literal
fix: Use parameterized queries: db.query('SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?', [id])
breach_precedent: SQL injection is #1 on OWASP Top 10. AI frequently uses string interpolation in queries.

name: SQL Injection via String Concatenation
fix: Use parameterized queries instead of string concatenation.

name: Unsanitized req.body to Database
fix: Validate with Zod/Yup/Joi before passing to database: const validated = schema.parse(req.body)

name: Command Injection via exec()
fix: Never pass user input to exec/eval. Use a whitelist of allowed commands.
breach_precedent: CurXecute CVE-2025-54135: command injection via MCP config.

name: Code Injection via eval()
fix: Never use eval() with user input. Parse JSON with JSON.parse() instead.

name: NoSQL Injection
fix: Validate and sanitize input before passing to MongoDB queries.

name: XSS via innerHTML
fix: Use textContent instead of innerHTML, or sanitize with DOMPurify.

name: XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML
fix: Avoid dangerouslySetInnerHTML. If necessary, sanitize with DOMPurify first.

name: Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR)
fix: Always check ownership before reading/mutating: ensure the requesting user owns the resource (e.g. WHERE id = $1 AND user_id = $2).
breach_precedent: IDOR is OWASP Top 10. Optus 2022 breach: 9.8M records exposed via missing ownership check on /api/users/:id.

name: Prisma query keyed only by req.params.id (likely IDOR)
fix: Add the current user to the where clause: where: { id: req.params.id, userId: req.user.id }.

name: Mass assignment via ...req.body spread
fix: Never spread req.body into a database write. Whitelist fields with Zod/Yup or pick only the allowed keys (e.g. { title, body } = req.body).
breach_precedent: GitHub 2012: mass assignment let any user grant themselves admin by adding `is_admin: true` to a PATCH body.

name: Mass assignment via Object.assign(user, req.body)
fix: Do not merge req.body straight into a model. Whitelist fields with a schema validator before updating.
